title: metastelma harleyi
intro: Metastelma harleyi, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, is a type of vining shrub native to Brazil. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Metastelma harleyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Metastelma harleyi can be made by infusing its leaves in water or using it in combination with other herbs in tinctures or teas.
